summary: Implemented the create-task priority change in repository XML and tightened regression coverage, but runtime acceptance still returns 维护成本台账 first because the existing sc.project.next_action.rule rows were not updated. The next-action XML remains under noupdate=1, so module upgrade preserved the old sequence and condition values in the database.

notes: The repository rule definitions changed, but runtime rule rows did not.
The project_next_action_rules XML is still noupdate-protected, so upgrade preserved old database values.
Further progress now requires a narrow batch that explicitly materializes the updated rule data into the existing runtime database.

next_step: Stop the chain and open a narrow implementation batch for next-action rule update semantics so the updated sequence and condition values are actually applied to existing sc.project.next_action.rule records.
